MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Gary T. Lee, Esq., (650-423-2038) appeared on behalf of plaintiff Anita Pereira. Trent J. Thornley, Esq., (415-760-1860) appeared on behalf of defendant Patricia Hernandez.

Defendant Patricia Hernandez Motion for Summary Adjudication of Plaintiff Anita Pereira's complaint, 2nd cause of action re: misrepresentation: GRANTED - issue of misrepresentation decided in arbitration. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2002 Off Calendar

Motion For Summary Adjudication/Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-29-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Gary T. Lee, Esq., (650-423-2038) appeared on behalf of plaintiff Anita Pereira. Trent J. Thornley, Esq., (415-760-1860) appeared on behalf of defendant Patricia Hernandez.

Plaintiff Anita Pereira's Motion for Summary Judgment or in the alternative Summary Adjudication of Defendant's cross-complaint. (1.) Re Breach of contract: DENIED - The issue of misrepresentation re mission St. practice was decided in arbitration and a triable issue of fact exists re breach of paragraph seven of Arbitration award and whether or not the parties' conduct is equal to recission. (2.) Re Conversion: GRANTED - no triable issue of fact exists re defendant's title or possession of the property.
